headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Boston Scientific, Datadog, Deckers Outdoor, McDonald’s, Murphy USA, On Semiconductor, Palantir Technologies, Texas Instruments, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower on this Thursday, but what a difference a month makes: 30 days ago, the worries over inflation and the spiraling situation in Iran were weighing heavily on the stock market. On Wednesday, the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 hit new all-time highs, driven by hopes for an extended ...
